current_life_events: The user has just received a reminder from their doctor about an upcoming thyroid check‑up, and a colleague made a casual remark about their weight during a team lunch. They also have an art portfolio review scheduled next week, which will involve showing their work to a panel of peers.
mental_state: Feeling exposed and uncertain, the user is anxious about how others perceive them and worried that their recent weight gain might affect their professional and creative reputation.
